info.name: FitCoach Pro API
info.description:
Complete API collection for FitCoach Pro — covers Auth, OTP, Coach, Trainee, Admin, Payments, Goals, InBody Reports, Progress Photos, and v1 Workout Plan builder.

**Base URLs:**
- Local: `http://localhost:8080/api`
- Production: `http://13.60.16.27/api`

Switch by changing `{{baseUrl}}` in Collection Variables.

**How to use:**
1. Import this collection into Postman.
2. Set `{{baseUrl}}` to local or production.
3. Run **Login (Coach)** to get `{{coachToken}}`, or **Login (Trainee)** for `{{traineeToken}}`.
4. Run **Create Invitation** → **Register Trainee** to onboard a trainee.
5. Workout Plan (v1): **Setup → Create plan → Add workout day → Replace exercises → Assign plan**.
6. Set `{{mealId}}` from **Get My Nutrition Plans** meal `id` when logging meals.
7. Admin endpoints require an ADMIN-role token — set `{{adminToken}}` manually.

body.raw:
{
  "fullName": "John Coach",
  "email": "john.coach@fitcoach.com",
  "password": "password123",
  "specialisation": "Strength & Conditioning",
  "bio": "10+ years helping athletes reach peak performance."
}

request.description: Public endpoint. Registers a new coach and returns a JWT token.
Login with coach credentials. Token is auto-saved to {{coachToken}}.
Login with trainee credentials. Token is auto-saved to {{traineeToken}}.
Public endpoint. Requires a valid invitationToken UUID generated by the coach. Run 'Create Invitation' first to populate {{invitationToken}}.
Public endpoint — no JWT required. Sends a 6-digit OTP to the provided email. Code is valid for 5 minutes.
Public endpoint — no JWT required. Validates the 6-digit OTP for the given email. Returns 200 on success, 400 on invalid/expired code.
Returns the authenticated coach's profile. Requires coach JWT.
Aggregated coach home data: coach profile, trainees list (needs attention / top performers / sessions), and invitations (pending invites).
Updates the authenticated coach's profile. All fields are optional.
Generates a UUID invitation token for the given email. Token is auto-saved to {{invitationToken}}.
Lists all invitations sent by the authenticated coach.
Lists all enrolled trainees who registered via the coach's invitation.
Returns trainee profile plus workout completion history (per-set completed/skipped/missed). Uses `{{traineeId}}`.
Coach updates a trainee's fitness goal and/or level. Both fields are optional.
Saves coach feedback and caution notes for a trainee. Both fields are optional.
Archives a trainee (soft status change). Only `"ARCHIVED"` is supported.
Soft-deletes a trainee from the coach's roster. Uses `{{traineeId}}`.
Returns coach alerts (e.g., trainees that need attention).

item.name: 🎯 Coach Goals
item.description: Coach sets, updates, and deletes goals for trainees.

request.description: Lists all goals set by this coach for the given trainee.
Creates a new goal for the trainee. `title` is required. `status` ∈ IN_PROGRESS | ACHIEVED | CANCELLED. `targetDate` is ISO date (yyyy-MM-dd).
Updates an existing goal. All fields are optional. Set `{{goalId}}` from **Create Trainee Goal**.
Permanently deletes a goal. Uses `{{goalId}}`.

item.name: 💳 Payments (Coach)
item.description: Coach submits payment receipts and checks subscription status.

formdata.description: JSON part — desiredPlan ∈ BASIC | PREMIUM | ELITE; paymentMethod ∈ VODAFONE_CASH | INSTAPAY

request.description:
Multipart form-data. Upload the payment screenshot and JSON data together.

- `desiredPlan` ∈ BASIC | PREMIUM | ELITE
- `paymentMethod` ∈ VODAFONE_CASH | INSTAPAY
- `transferredAmount` — the amount the coach claims to have sent

Returns ACCEPTED (202) while pending, APPROVED (200) if auto-approved, REJECTED (402) if rejected.
Returns the coach's current subscription plan, status, expiry date, and client-slot usage.
Returns a list of all payment submissions made by this coach (newest first).
Returns the authenticated trainee's profile. Requires trainee JWT.
Updates the authenticated trainee's profile. All fields are optional.
Aggregated trainee home data for 'Today': profile, coach, today's workout & nutrition summaries, weekly goals, achievements.
Returns the profile of the coach who invited this trainee.
Returns the trainee's **most recently created** assigned nutrition plan with full detail: meals with macros and ingredients. Set `{{mealId}}` from a meal's `id` when calling **Complete Meal**.
Returns summary list of the trainee's assigned exercise plans.
Full plan detail with sessions and exercises. Plan ID is a UUID for v1 plans.
Returns `planId`, `planTitle`, `planDescription`, and `sessions[]` with `sessionId`, `title`, `dayOrder`, `exerciseCount` — no exercise lines.
Marks a plan session (workout day) completed for today. Set `{{planSessionId}}` (UUID) from the plan detail.

Logs today's meal. **Body is optional** — omit for default full completion.
- `skipMeal: true` → skip entire meal
- `skippedIngredientIds` → ingredients not eaten
- `replacedIngredients` → swaps: `originalIngredientId`, `newIngredientId`, optional `newQuantity`
Example: skip the entire meal for today.
Example: skipped ingredient ID 1, swapped ingredient ID 2 → 3 with 150g. Replace IDs from **Get My Nutrition Plans** / **Get All Ingredients**.
Logs an ad-hoc meal not part of the assigned nutrition plan. Either `ingredientId` (auto-resolves name) or free-text `name` is required. `calories` is required (min 1). `date` defaults to today.
Sets total water consumed for a day (liters). Replaces any previous value for that date. `date` defaults to today if omitted.

query.description: ISO date yyyy-MM-dd. Defaults to today if omitted.

request.description: Returns liters logged for a given day (0 if not logged). `date` defaults to today.

formdata.description: Image file (also accepted as: photo, image, picture)
Optional label: Front / Back / Side / free text
Optional ISO date (yyyy-MM-dd). Defaults to today.

request.description: Trainee uploads their own progress photo. Accepted field names: `file`, `photo`, `image`, `picture`.
Lists all of the authenticated trainee's own progress photos.
Deletes a trainee's own progress photo by ID. Uses `{{photoId}}`.

formdata.description: InBody PDF or image file (also accepted as: photo, image, picture)
Optional ISO date (yyyy-MM-dd). Defaults to today.

request.description: Trainee uploads their own InBody report (PDF or image). File is stored as-is; no content parsing is performed.
Lists all of the authenticated trainee's own InBody reports.
Deletes a trainee's own InBody report (DB record + file). Uses `{{reportId}}`.

item.name: 📈 Progress (Trainee)
item.description: Trainee-only progress endpoints: workout logging (per set), measurements, and progress pictures.

item.name: Complete Plan Session with Logs (per exercise, per set)

request.description: Logs completion for a plan session with per-exercise outcomes. Replace `planSessionExerciseId` with a real UUID from the plan detail. `outcome` ∈ COMPLETED | SKIPPED | MISSED.
Creates a measurement log entry for the authenticated trainee.
Lists all measurement log entries for the authenticated trainee (newest first).
Stores picture URLs (not file upload). Use `POST /trainees/me/progress-photos` for actual file upload.
Lists all progress picture URL entries for the authenticated trainee (newest first).

item.name: 📈 Progress (Coach)
item.description: Coach-only endpoints to review trainee workout logs, measurements, progress photos, and InBody reports.

request.description: Lists trainee workout logs including per-exercise excuses and set-level outcomes.
Adds coach review notes to a workout log. Set `{{workoutLogId}}` from **Get Trainee Workout Logs**.
Lists all measurements for a trainee (coach access).
Lists all JSON-URL progress pictures for a trainee (coach access).
Lists all uploaded progress photo files for a trainee (coach access).

formdata.description: Optional: Front / Back / Side / free text
Optional ISO date (yyyy-MM-dd). Defaults to today.

request.description: Coach uploads a progress photo on behalf of a trainee. Coach must own the trainee.
Deletes a progress photo by ID (DB record + file). Uses `{{photoId}}`.
Lists all InBody reports for a trainee. Coach must own the trainee.

formdata.description: Optional ISO date (yyyy-MM-dd). Defaults to today.

request.description: Coach uploads an InBody report on behalf of a trainee. No content parsing — file stored as-is.
Deletes an InBody report (DB record + file). Uses `{{reportId}}`.
Lists all available exercises (seeded from wger open source API).
Lists all available ingredients (seeded from Open Food Facts).

query.description: true = delete all exercises & ingredients first (fails if still referenced by meals/plan lines)

request.description: Downloads English exercises and ingredients from wger and saves them. Use `replace=true` only when catalog has no FK references.
Creates a new nutrition plan. Can add meals using predefined ingredient IDs or custom calories.
Retrieves all nutrition plans created by the coach.
Assigns an existing nutrition plan to one or more trainees. Replace `1` in the URL with the actual plan ID.
Creates a new exercise plan and assigns it to trainees, with per-exercise sets/reps/load/rest.
Retrieves all exercise plans created by the coach.
Assigns an existing exercise plan to one or more trainees. Replace `1` in the URL with the actual plan ID.

item.name: 📋 Workout Plans (v1 API)
item.description: Hierarchical API: WorkoutPlan → PlanSession → PlanSessionExercise → PlanAssignment. Requires ROLE_COACH. Run in order; tests auto-store `workoutPlanId` and `planSessionId`.

request.description: Calls coach profile and saves `data.id` to `{{coachId}}` for use in Create plan.
`coachId` must match the authenticated coach.
Adds a PlanSession (workout day). Uses `{{workoutPlanId}}` from Create plan.
Body must be a **raw JSON array**. Replaces all exercise lines for this session. Adjust `exerciseId` values from **Get All Exercises**.
Trainee must belong to this coach. Second assign returns 409 CONFLICT.

item.name: 🛡️ Admin
item.description: Admin-only endpoints. All routes require ROLE_ADMIN — set {{adminToken}} manually after logging in with an admin account.

request.description: Returns platform-wide KPIs: total coaches, trainees, payments, and revenue.
Returns a summary list of all coaches with their trainee counts.
Returns full details of a single coach including their complete trainee roster. Uses `{{coachId}}`.
Returns all trainees belonging to the given coach. Uses `{{coachId}}`.
Returns all payment records across every coach, sorted newest-first.
Returns all payment records submitted by a specific coach, sorted newest-first. Uses `{{coachId}}`.
